blocks.text: We woke up yesterday late. Just enjoying the villa and Greek life as usual. We have been eating very very well on Methana. Every day delicious Greek salad. Alex showed us how to prepare the best salads. The secret is to use insane amount of feta cheese, and olive oil. They have a saying here in Greece . "A kilo of feta a day keeps the devil away". We also made more Italian bread from scratch .
In the afternoon, we called Elias, since he said Saturday, he would take us to a volcano. He picked us up in his truck and drove us to the trail head, which was at his house.
Elias (Ελιας) drove us in his truck. It's much easier to climb the mountain in Elias truck than to bike up.
The volcano trail was amazing. We got to the top of the volcano. We all did the hiking sandals. It's my first time doing a hike and sandals, and I loved it.
Also, we sat and watch the sunset at the top of the volcano.

blocks.caption: reaching the top of the volcano

blocks.text: After the hike Elias made us all pasta at his house and gave us great recommendations for where to go in the Peloponnese mountains.
So we have a list of places we will try and visit over the next several days.
On the way up I'm Elias's truck we stopped to water some of Elias's trees and check out an ancient Byzantine era church with some beautiful art inside.

blocks.caption: Elias cat. My favourite of his cats

blocks.text: Elias if you read this thank you so much for having us in your home and making us delicious food. I really enjoyed hearing about the island. Hope we meet again
